title: Descend
description: Teleports any entity falling into the void in The End back to the Overworld instead of letting them die.
body: A lightweight utility plugin that prevents entities from dying in the void when falling in The End. Instead of being lost forever, entities are safely teleported back to the Overworld. Any entity that take void damage The End will be automatically teleported to the Overworld at the same X/Z coordinates but high up at Y = 320, giving them a chance to fall safely.
